---
title: ""
format: html
---
## Syllabus
```{=html}
<title>Schedule</title>
<style type="text/css">

code.r{
  font-size: 30px;
}
</style>

<a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Schedule/NRS 520 Syllabus.pdf">Syllabus (PDF)</a></p>
```

### Readings

Come prepared to discuss the assigned reading. What was interesting and useful? What did not make sense to you? What did you disagree with? What did you learn? <span style="color:red">Bring points to highlight and bring questions (make a list)</span>.


## Schedule {.smaller}

| Week       | Topic                                          |
|------------|------------------------------------------------|
|~~1 (Sep 12)~~ |~~Class Org., Data vs. Information, R/Markdown~~| 
|~~2 (Sep 19)~~ | ~~R coding and Markdown~~                      | 
|~~3 (Sep 26)~~ | ~~Power Analysis, Study Design~~               |
|~~4 (Oct 3)~~| ~~Probability and Statistics~~                   |
|~~5 (Oct 10)~~  | ~~No Class / Holiday~~                        |
| ~~6 (Oct 17)~~    | ~~Regression modeling in R~~               |
| ~~7 (Oct 24)~~    | ~~Generalized Linear Models~~              |
| ~~8 (Oct 31)~~    | ~~Bayesian Models~~                        |
| ~~9 (Nov 7)~~    | ~~No Class or new readings or HW~~                |
| ~~10 (Nov 14)~~    | ~~Bayesian Mixed Models / Hierarchical Models~~            |
| ~~11 (Nov 21)~~    | ~~Bayesian Mixed Models / Hierarchical Models~~         |
| 12 (Nov 28) | Student lecture/lab             |
| 13 (Dec 5) | Student lecture/lab               |
| 14 (Dec 12) | Student lecture/lab               |

: {tbl-colwidths="\[30,70\]"}
